title: visiania glomerata
intro: Visiania glomerata, also known as the globe daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Visiania glomerata include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Visiania glomerata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
